evidence.source_title: Why was this Iran dissident group raided in Europe?
evidence.description: Albanian police cited suspicions of cyberattack activity connected to MEK members as a justification for the 2023 raid, invoking the context of the 2022 HomeLand Justice cyberattack attributed to Iran.

editorial_notes: The 2023 raid occurred partly in the context of Albania-Iran cyber tensions stemming from the July 2022 HomeLand Justice attack.
